title: CHERRIOTS DAY PASSES - 211info
text: HOMELESS OUTREACH & ADVOCACY PROJECT CHERRIOTS DAY PASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides single-trip bus tickets for the Salem-Keizer area as supplies allow on a first-come, first-served basis. 694 Church Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm and 2pm-4pm Appointments: Monday-Friday 2pm-4pm Email (503) 588-5827 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers HOAP Program (503) 588-5827 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to confirm passes are available prior to walking in. Passes are distributed during business hours only. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of important appointment to attend (i.e., doctor's appointment, court appearance, job interview) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Keizer and Salem SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the intersection of Union and Church Streets. On various primary bus routes. Walking distance from downtown core area. Services: Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS OUTREACH AND ADVOCACY PROJECT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 MENTAL HEALTH AND SUICIDE LIFELINE UTILITIES - EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
